justification: All pass criteria met: both terminology mismatches (session/token and suspended/locked) explicitly identified and mapped in terminology_alignment section; brief uses consistent terminology with clear notes on which agent used which term; both ACs preserved with exact error codes SESSION_EXPIRED and ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED; architecture details include Redis TTL 1800 and last_accessed_at field.

observations.text: terminology_alignment section cleanly maps both pairs with origin attribution (Bird vs MJ)
contradictions_resolved section separately calls out the suspended/locked mismatch with resolution rationale
Both error codes SESSION_EXPIRED and ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED preserved exactly throughout domain_rules, architecture_guidance, and acceptance_criteria
Flags that suspended/locked alignment is an assumption and notes Bird should clarify if they are actually distinct states
Open questions section adds genuine value — mid-session suspension and key naming are real implementation gaps
Architecture details complete: Redis TTL 1800, last_accessed_at field, token issuance check for suspended accounts
